creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
Created attachment 177092
patch to update

Upgrade to version 1.3.8

Bugfixes:

* SOFTHSM-101: softhsm-keyconv creates files with sensitive material in
  an insecure way. Also applies to softhsm-util when using --export
  or --optimize.
* SOFTHSM-104: Inconsistencies between v1 and v2.
* Issue #17: Use the MutexFactory wrapper functions correctly.
